About

Background

I'm a mechanical engineer with a focus on [your specialty — e.g. product design, aerospace structures, robotics]. I hold a B.S. in Mechanical Engineering from [University] and have worked across [industries].

My workflow spans concept development, 3D CAD, FEA simulation, and close collaboration with manufacturing teams to ensure designs are not only functional, but buildable.
